title: SWG v1 Released
excerpt: Static Website Generator v1 is now available with Astro theme support, JSON-first content management and a modern publishing workflow.
content:
# SWG v1 Released

We're excited to announce the first public release of Static Website Generator.

## What's New

SWG v1 introduces a JSON-first architecture for building static websites with Astro.

### Highlights

- JSON as the single source of truth
- Native Astro theme support
- Markdown page editor
- Blog and documentation support
- Theme import and packaging
- Modern Tailwind-based administration

## Built for Developers

Themes are standard Astro projects that can be developed locally using your favorite editor. Once completed, they can be packaged and imported directly into Static Website Generator.

## Fast and Secure

Because SWG generates static websites, your projects benefit from excellent performance, improved security and straightforward deployments.

## What's Next

Future releases will introduce additional themes, AI-assisted tooling and an expanding ecosystem for developers.

Thank you for following the development of Static Website Generator.
meta_description: Announcing the first public release of Static Website Generator with Astro themes and JSON-first content management.
